name: controlium
description: Drive your real Chrome over CDP, bringing the working tab to the front with a synthetic cursor.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to the Controlium Chrome extension via a local WebSocket bridge. Claude can open tabs, navigate, click, type, screenshot and read pages in your real Chrome — always bringing the working tab to the front and showing a visible cursor. Requires the Controlium extension to be loaded in Chrome. Runs its bridge on port 8766 so it can coexist with a Claude Code instance on 8765.
